description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a spacious front yard featuring a driveway and a parked car. The house has a symmetrical facade with multiple shuttered windows and a covered front porch supported by columns. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and is surrounded by well-maintained grass and several trees. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms and furnishings. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, and the roof is dark gray. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and walkways, with landscaping elements such as shrubs and flowering trees.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance with porch, and a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and large windows opening to the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the garage, the pool area, and the driveway curving around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, supported by columns, and flanked by shuttered windows.
